description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image with a before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq and apt-get install -yqq --no-install-recommends build-essential libsodium-dev. Define variables APT_CACHE_DIR=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/apt and CARGO_HOME=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, and cache the apt/, cargo/, and target/ directories. Define three stages: test, benchmark, and build. In the test stage add a cargo build job that runs "rustc --version && cargo --version", then "cargo build --release", then "strip target/release/iridium", and publishes the binary as an artifact named iridium from target/release/iridium. Also in the test stage add a cargo test job (allow_failure:true) that runs "rustc --version && cargo --version" and "cargo test --all --verbose". In the benchmark stage add a cargo bench job that runs "rustc --version && cargo --version" and "cargo bench", and stores the benchmark results as an artifact named benchmark_results from target/criterion. No special rules or deployment targets are defined.
